name: pandamarket
description: PandaMarket - Tunisian MaaS (Marketplace as a Service) platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start -w backend" "npm run start -w frontend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run docker:up && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run migrate && npm run seed

author: PandaMarket Team
